metadata.title: Enterprise Crm And Revenue Operations Data Assets
metadata.description: Starter catalog of key business, PII, and security-sensitive data assets for the Enterprise Crm And Revenue Operations domain.

assets.name: Customer Profile
assets.description: Core customer account, profile, and preference data used across domain journeys.
assets.accessScope: customer-facing journeys and approved internal operations
assets.businessMeaning: Core customer account, profile, and preference data used across domain journeys.

assets.name: Customer Contact Point
assets.description: Verified email, phone, and contactability state used for messaging and recovery.
assets.businessMeaning: Verified email, phone, and contactability state used for messaging and recovery.

interfaces.name: customer-contact-point api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Customer Contact Point.

assets.name: Consent Record
assets.description: Privacy, tracking, and communication consent history with auditable decisions.
assets.businessMeaning: Privacy, tracking, and communication consent history with auditable decisions.

assets.name: Identity Credential
assets.description: Credential metadata, password hashes, or authentication factor references.
assets.businessMeaning: Credential metadata, password hashes, or authentication factor references.

assets.name: Session Token
assets.description: Short-lived authenticated session state, refresh metadata, and revocation information.
assets.businessMeaning: Short-lived authenticated session state, refresh metadata, and revocation information.

assets.name: Access Policy
assets.description: Authorization rules, entitlements, restrictions, and access guardrails.
assets.businessMeaning: Authorization rules, entitlements, restrictions, and access guardrails.

assets.name: Audit Log
assets.description: Security and compliance event trail for sensitive operations and lifecycle changes.
assets.businessMeaning: Security and compliance event trail for sensitive operations and lifecycle changes.

assets.name: Payment Instrument Reference
assets.description: Tokenized payment method references or vaulted instrument links used in protected commerce flows.
assets.businessMeaning: Tokenized payment method references or vaulted instrument links used in protected commerce flows.

interfaces.name: payment-instrument-reference api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Payment Instrument Reference.

governance.sharingPolicy: approved payment and finance usage only

assets.name: Transaction
assets.description: Commercial or financial transaction state tracked across purchase, settlement, or payout workflows.
assets.businessMeaning: Commercial or financial transaction state tracked across purchase, settlement, or payout workflows.

governance.sharingPolicy: approved payment and finance usage only

assets.name: Account Management And 360
assets.description: Maintains the core account, hierarchy, insight, and whitespace model used by revenue and service teams.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Account Management and 360.

interfaces.name: account-management-and-360 api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Account Management And 360.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Contact And Relationship
assets.description: Manages contacts, person accounts, contact roles, and relationship structures tied to accounts and opportunities.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Contact and Relationship.

interfaces.name: contact-and-relationship api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Contact And Relationship.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Opportunity And Sales
assets.description: Manages the active deal record, seller actions, stage progression, and sales-console workflow.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Opportunity and Sales.

interfaces.name: opportunity-and-sales api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Opportunity And Sales.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Catalog And Bundle
assets.description: Maintains the product catalog, bundles, variants, and commercial line-item structure used across CPQ workflows.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Catalog and Bundle.

interfaces.name: catalog-and-bundle api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Catalog And Bundle.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Pricing And Discount Governance
assets.description: Controls discounts, price approvals, channel pricing, and volume-based commercial policy during revenue workflows.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Pricing and Discount Governance.

interfaces.name: pricing-and-discount-governance api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Pricing And Discount Governance.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Contract Lifecycle And Legal Review
assets.description: Moves approved quotes into contract, clause, approval, and legal-review workflows tied to the commercial record.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Contract Lifecycle and Legal Review.

interfaces.name: contract-lifecycle-and-legal-review api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Contract Lifecycle And Legal Review.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Billing Invoicing And Subscription Lifecycle
assets.description: Handles billing, invoicing, renewals, amendments, cancellations, and subscription continuity after booking.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Billing, Invoicing, and Subscription Lifecycle.

interfaces.name: billing-invoicing-and-subscription-lifecycle api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Billing Invoicing And Subscription Lifecycle.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Identity Roles And Permission Sets
assets.description: Controls roles, profiles, permission sets, and trust boundaries across Salesforce workflows and automation.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Identity, Roles, and Permission Sets.

interfaces.name: identity-roles-and-permission-sets api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Identity Roles And Permission Sets.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only
